description_long: This is an adult male figure lying flat on his back with arms relaxed at his sides and legs extended straight. He is dressed in a short-sleeved, casual crew-neck shirt and a pair of fitted jeans. His feet are bare, and his toes are visible from the rear view. The figure's hair is short and neatly styled, and his facial features are clearly defined. The clothing fits closely to the body, showing the contours of the torso and limbs. The overall appearance suggests a relaxed, non-defensive posture typical of someone resting or unconscious in an urban environment.
description: An adult male figure in casual attire, lying flat on his back with arms at his sides and bare feet visible.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the head, torso, arms, and legs extended straight, with the shirt and jeans clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, arm, and the full length of the body and legs.
description_view_2: View from the feet, showing the soles, back of the legs, and the back of the head and torso.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the facial profile, arm, and the side of the body and legs.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved t-shirt and fitted jeans
attribute_posture: lying flat on back with arms at sides and legs extended
